title: M@GICAL CURE! LOVE SHOT!
artist: Mitchie M ft. Hatsune Miku (SAWTOWNE EN cover timing)

lines.ja: Hello everyone!
lines.en: Hello everyone!

lines.ja: I'm Hatsune Miku, a virtual Idol
lines.en: I'm Hatsune Miku, a virtual Idol

lines.ja: Well that's what everyone seems to think
lines.en: Well that's what everyone seems to think

lines.ja: But secretly, I'm- (hehe)
lines.en: But secretly, I'm- (hehe)

lines.ja: うりゃ おい! うりゃ おい! Ooh, fighter!
lines.en: うりゃ おい! うりゃ おい! Ooh, fighter!

lines.ja: Super powerful Miku-Chan
lines.en: Super powerful Miku-Chan

lines.ja: うりゃ おい! うりゃ おい! Ooh, cyber!
lines.en: うりゃ おい! うりゃ おい! Ooh, cyber!

lines.ja: Miku, Miku, Miku, go!
lines.en: Miku, Miku, Miku, go!

lines.ja: I wake up to a call, put my frilly outfit on now
lines.en: I wake up to a call, put my frilly outfit on now

lines.ja: It's time I open up my eyes and start the day
lines.en: It's time I open up my eyes and start the day

lines.ja: I combat 'til the dawn, until every villain's gone, wah!
lines.en: I combat 'til the dawn, until every villain's gone, wah!

lines.ja: A clumsy trip and now I've fallen to my butt
lines.en: A clumsy trip and now I've fallen to my butt

lines.ja: With my magical phone and a silly little ringtone
lines.en: With my magical phone and a silly little ringtone

lines.ja: I'll shout a magic word and set the world in place
lines.en: I'll shout a magic word and set the world in place

lines.ja: Whatever it may cost, there's no reason to stop
lines.en: Whatever it may cost, there's no reason to stop

lines.ja: For a world that I cherish and love
lines.en: For a world that I cherish and love

lines.ja: Monsters might be a scary foe to fight
lines.en: Monsters might be a scary foe to fight

lines.ja: But I'll take the stand
lines.en: But I'll take the stand

lines.ja: If I can stop your tears and wipe them dry
lines.en: If I can stop your tears and wipe them dry

lines.ja: (I'll make you feel magical)
lines.en: (I'll make you feel magical)

lines.ja: If my pain's a type of cure for peace, I don't mind
lines.en: If my pain's a type of cure for peace, I don't mind

lines.ja: I can play as a nurse healing you everyday
lines.en: I can play as a nurse healing you everyday

lines.ja: So what if I might shed a tear, get some bruises?
lines.en: So what if I might shed a tear, get some bruises?

lines.ja: A wipe is all I need to clean the cherry blush away, ha!
lines.en: A wipe is all I need to clean the cherry blush away, ha!

lines.ja: Fighting through the night, but I'm wide awake
lines.en: Fighting through the night, but I'm wide awake

lines.ja: It can all be so hard for me to get through the day
lines.en: It can all be so hard for me to get through the day

lines.ja: Your smile is enough to heal all my aches
lines.en: Your smile is enough to heal all my aches

lines.ja: Wrapped in a cute band-aid
lines.en: Wrapped in a cute band-aid

lines.ja: I can take the pain, fight all day, fill up the syringe with love
lines.en: I can take the pain, fight all day, fill up the syringe with love

lines.ja: Heal up the world and go again
lines.en: Heal up the world and go again

lines.ja: うりゃ おい! うりゃ おい! Ooh, fighter!
lines.en: うりゃ おい! うりゃ おい! Ooh, fighter!

lines.ja: Super powerful Miku-Chan
lines.en: Super powerful Miku-Chan

lines.ja: うりゃ おい! うりゃ おい! Ooh, cyber!
lines.en: うりゃ おい! うりゃ おい! Ooh, cyber!

lines.ja: Miku, Miku, Miku, go!
lines.en: Miku, Miku, Miku, go!

lines.ja: And now, it's time for the moment you've been waiting for!
lines.en: And now, it's time for the moment you've been waiting for!

lines.ja: One, two, three
lines.en: One, two, three

lines.ja: Ready?
lines.en: Ready?

lines.ja: Miku, Miku beam! (Keep going!)
lines.en: Miku, Miku beam! (Keep going!)

lines.ja: On my own, without anyone to know
lines.en: On my own, without anyone to know

lines.ja: How my job's not all rainbows
lines.en: How my job's not all rainbows

lines.ja: But then, I think about your smile
lines.en: But then, I think about your smile

lines.ja: (Your words are so lyrical)
lines.en: (Your words are so lyrical)

lines.ja: I'm a magically bright invincible girl
lines.en: I'm a magically bright invincible girl

lines.ja: If you need me to heal, go on and call out my name
lines.en: If you need me to heal, go on and call out my name

lines.ja: When you find yourself going down a spiral
lines.en: When you find yourself going down a spiral

lines.ja: I'll bonk away what puts you down, a pink hammer melee, ya!
lines.en: I'll bonk away what puts you down, a pink hammer melee, ya!

lines.ja: Fighting through the night, but I'm wide awake
lines.en: Fighting through the night, but I'm wide awake

lines.ja: All alone, it's so hard for me to get through the rain
lines.en: All alone, it's so hard for me to get through the rain

lines.ja: Your smile is enough to make my day
lines.en: Your smile is enough to make my day

lines.ja: So I stand tall and brave
lines.en: So I stand tall and brave

lines.ja: 'Cause I'm not afraid, any pain, I can laugh away, chin up
lines.en: 'Cause I'm not afraid, any pain, I can laugh away, chin up

lines.ja: With love, I'll fight on 'til the end
lines.en: With love, I'll fight on 'til the end

lines.ja: Bearing through the pain, I try to be brave
lines.en: Bearing through the pain, I try to be brave

lines.ja: As long as you can stay happy, I'm okay
lines.en: As long as you can stay happy, I'm okay

lines.ja: I'm not gonna bend, ha!
lines.en: I'm not gonna bend, ha!

lines.ja: I can be a cure for peace in your heart
lines.en: I can be a cure for peace in your heart

lines.ja: And I'll play as a nurse healing you every day
lines.en: And I'll play as a nurse healing you every day

lines.ja: Your smile is enough to heal all my aches
lines.en: Your smile is enough to heal all my aches

lines.ja: All in a cute band-aid
lines.en: All in a cute band-aid

lines.ja: If you're feeling pain, call my name, I'll be by your side
lines.en: If you're feeling pain, call my name, I'll be by your side

lines.ja: 'Til I see your smile beam bright again
lines.en: 'Til I see your smile beam bright again

lines.en: うりゃ おい! うりゃ おい! Ooh, fighter!
